payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL operations. This command requires elevated privileges.
citations: Access control policy: /brain admin commands restricted to administrators only

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for /brain admin sql commands

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin SQL command without authorization

repair_options: Contact system administrator to request elevated privileges if legitimate need exists
Use standard /brain commands available to normal users
